hero_subtitle: SFTY connects corporate verification, provider outputs, and risk-based review into a centralized audit trail to support compliant KYB onboarding workflows for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Onboarding and KYB compliance materials often exist across multiple disconnected providers and manual processes. This fragmentation creates gaps in audit trails, making it difficult for compliance teams to assemble complete and defensible evidence packages for corporate review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates multiple KYB provider outputs, corporate data, risk rules and reviewer actions into one audit-ready onboarding workflow for compliance teams managing corporate onboarding evidence.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider outputs, sanctions screening, UBO reviews and internal decisions into a structured workflow preserving clear, auditable KYB onboarding evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms isolated KYB provider outputs into structured workflows, connecting reviews, decisions and evidence essential for clear audit trails and consistent corporate onboarding control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured KYB workflows that preserve audit evidence, orchestrate providers and prepare clear due diligence for controlled enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to build audit evidence for KYB onboarding
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYB provider outputs form audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding workflows preserve decision and review history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports structured risk-based KYB reviews
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYB compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects KYB checks into structured, auditable workflows, enabling regulated digital asset businesses to manage corporate onboarding and due diligence efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support KYB audit evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYB provider outputs and internal decisions into comprehensive evidence packages that support audit readiness and clarify how onboarding reviews were conducted.
faq_3_question: How are onboarding decisions and evidence preserved?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding cases, reviewer actions, decision logs and supporting documents in structured audit records for compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs into connected workflows without requiring provider replacement or disruption.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYB or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, workflows, evidence and reporting for regulated digital asset businesses.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready workflows for KYB onboarding
final_description: Review how SFTY connects corporate checks, provider outputs and risk reviews into structured onboarding evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
